Title: Fact Check Tools Recents

URL Source: https://toolbox.google.com/factcheck/explorer

Markdown Content:
Claim by YouTube channel Robin Sweet News:

Impeachment complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte dismissed due to constitutional technicalities.

VERA Files rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by Social Media users:

This video shows IDF soldiers torturing Palestinian hostages before executing them.

India Today rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by x.com:

Trump posted a depiction of himself as a Christ-like healer

Lead Stories rating:  Truth Social

23 hours ago

Claim by Social Media User:

The video shows security personnel firing tear gas shells at TMC workers in West Bengal.

FACTLY rating:  False

23 hours ago

A collage of images spreading online in April 2026 authentically shows U.S. first lady Melania Trump with the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

Snopes rating:  Fake

23 hours ago

Claim by NPP Deniyaya:

News graphic shares genuine quote from Sri Lankan ex-minister

AFP Fact Check rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by Facebook page Memeng Malupet:

Sara Duterte "finalized" a deal with Iran's Petroleum Minister Mohsen Paknejad for the "safe passage of Davao-bound tankers" through the Strait of Hormuz.

VERA Files rating:  Fake

23 hours ago

Claim by Multiple sources:

Video of Indian Army attacking ruling party goons in West Bengal

AFP Fact Check rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by truthsocial.com:

Truth Social post shows how Bruce Springsteen looked prior to plastic surgery.

Lead Stories rating:  Edited Image

23 hours ago

The fast fashion retailer Shein faced a lawsuit in April 2026 after laboratory testing found its clothes contained potentially harmful chemicals including formaldehyde, which is used to preserve dead bodies.

Snopes.com rating:  True

23 hours ago

Claim by PINAS BALITA TV:

Leyte 1st District Representative and former House speaker Martin Romualdez has been found guilty by the Supreme Court and is sentenced to jail.

Rappler rating:  False

23 hours ago

A South Carolina resident named Pam Luongo accidentally attracted real flamingos after placing plastic flamingos in her front walkway, leading officials to designate her property as a protected habitat.

Snopes.com rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by tiktok.com:

Rachel Maddow air a segment claiming that a federal judge has ruled that Melania Trump must testify against her husband.

Lead Stories rating:  Never Said

23 hours ago

Claim by Twitter,Facebook:

This video shows Israeli ambassador to India Reuven Azar at Indian media questions.

The Quint rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by PTI Fact Check:

The army was claimed to have lathi-charged TMC people who were creating a ruckus amid the election atmosphere.

PTI rating:  Misleading

23 hours ago

An image authentically shows U.S. first lady Melania Trump holding a clear plastic cup at a party, standing between the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and a woman.

Snopes rating:  Fake

23 hours ago

A screenshot authentically shows an image U.S. President Donald Trump shared in a Truth Social post on April 12, 2026, depicting him in the likeness of Jesus Christ.

Snopes.com rating:  True

23 hours ago

Claim by Social Media User:

The viral video shows a woman being thrown onto a footpath from a moving vehicle after being raped in Faridabad (Haryana).

FACTLY rating:  False

23 hours ago

Claim by Viral social media post:

An image appears to show Cheng Li-wun, Taiwan's main opposition Kuomintang party chairwoman, flashing a V-sign with the palm inward and smiling at politically sensitive sites in Nanjing during her historical visit to mainland China.

annie lab rating:  False. Image is created with a Google's AI tool. The acutal monument is much taller than the AI image shows. It is physically impossible for a person to pose next to it without assistance as seen in the fabricated image.

23 hours ago

Claim by Facebook posts:

Video shows India Today reporting that JD Vance's plane will not land in Pakistan

BOOM Fact Check rating:  False

23 hours ago
